title: pelargonium × orbiculatum
intro: Pelargonium × orbiculatum is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family, commonly known as a type of bush geranium. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium × orbiculatum include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm coughs, and ease congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. It can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
